name: ENBRIDGE INC
summary: Enbridge Inc. is a Canadian energy infrastructure company operating liquids pipelines, gas transmission, gas distribution and storage, and renewable power generation businesses. It transports crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGL) across North America, distributes natural gas through regulated utilities in Canada and the US, and generates renewable energy including wind and solar power.

products.name: Liquids Pipelines
products.description: Transportation of crude oil and NGL across North America via pipeline networks.

products.name: Gas Transmission
products.description: Natural gas transmission across North America including Texas Eastern, Algonquin, and other pipelines.

products.name: Gas Distribution and Storage
products.description: Natural gas distribution to end customers via regulated utilities including Enbridge Gas Ontario, EOG, PSNC, and Questar.

products.name: Renewable Power Generation
products.description: Generation of electricity from wind, solar, and renewable natural gas (RNG) sources.

products.name: Renewable Natural Gas (RNG)
products.description: Production of RNG from landfill gas via Tomorrow RNG facilities operated by Morrow Renewables.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partner in the Whistler Parent JV formed on May 29, 2024.
